pkg/kafka.purpose: Shared low-level Kafka infrastructure: typed config structs that compile to kafka.ConfigMap, a TopicProvisioner with LRU cache, librdkafka log bridging to slog, and an OTel metrics sub-package. Primary constraint: pure infrastructure plumbing — no domain or business logic.

patterns.name: ConfigMapper + ConfigValidator interfaces
patterns.description: Every config param struct (CommonConfigParams, ConsumerConfigParams, ProducerConfigParams) implements both ConfigMapper (AsConfigMap() → kafka.ConfigMap) and ConfigValidator (Validate() error). Composite configs (ConsumerConfig, ProducerConfig, AdminConfig) embed param structs and delegate to mergeConfigsToMap + sequential validators.
patterns.example:
type ConsumerConfig struct { CommonConfigParams; ConsumerConfigParams }
func (c ConsumerConfig) AsConfigMap() (kafka.ConfigMap, error) { return mergeConfigsToMap(c.CommonConfigParams, c.ConsumerConfigParams) }

patterns.name: configValue interface for string enums
patterns.description: Every string-based enum (BrokerAddressFamily, Partitioner, AutoOffsetReset, TimeDurationMilliSeconds) implements fmt.Stringer + encoding.TextUnmarshaler + json.Unmarshaler. Validation uses ValidValues[T] slice with AsKeyMap() for O(1) lookup.

patterns.name: TimeDurationMilliSeconds renders as millisecond integer string
patterns.description: TimeDurationMilliSeconds.String() returns the duration in milliseconds as a decimal string (e.g. '6000' for 6s) — the format librdkafka expects for *.ms config keys. Never pass raw time.Duration to kafka.ConfigMap.

patterns.name: TopicProvisioner LRU cache + noop guard
patterns.description: NewTopicProvisioner returns a TopicProvisionerNoop when Kafka admin is unavailable. The concrete topicProvisioner skips cached topics in Provision and skips ProtectedTopics in DeProvision. Both ErrTopicAlreadyExists and ErrUnknownTopicOrPart are treated as success, not errors.

patterns.name: Sequential fail-fast validation in constructors
patterns.description: NewTopicProvisioner validates AdminClient, Logger, and Meter with explicit nil checks before registering any OTel metrics, returning immediately on first failure. OTel registration errors are also returned sequentially.
patterns.example: if config.AdminClient == nil { return nil, errors.New("kafka admin client is required") }

patterns.name: LogProcessor oklog/run-compatible pair
patterns.description: LogProcessor returns (execute func() error, interrupt func(error)) — the exact oklog/run.Group pair. ConsumeLogChannel is the simpler goroutine-targeted variant. Both require go.logs.channel.enable=true which ConsumerConfigParams and ProducerConfigParams set automatically in AsConfigMap.
patterns.example: func LogProcessor(logEmitter LogEmitter, logger *slog.Logger) (execute func() error, interrupt func(error))

patterns.name: metadata.max.age.ms always 3× TopicMetadataRefreshInterval
patterns.description: CommonConfigParams.AsConfigMap sets metadata.max.age.ms to 3×TopicMetadataRefreshInterval whenever TopicMetadataRefreshInterval is non-zero. Never set metadata.max.age.ms independently — it must track refresh interval to avoid premature metadata cache expiry.

key_file_guides.role: Defines all Kafka config param structs and their ConfigMapper/ConfigValidator implementations. mergeConfigsToMap merges multiple ConfigMapper outputs into one kafka.ConfigMap.
key_file_guides.watch_for: localhost/127.0.0.1 brokers auto-force BrokerAddressFamilyIPv4 when BrokerAddressFamily is empty — do not override this. Cooperative and eager PartitionAssignmentStrategy values must not be mixed — Validate() enforces this. StatsInterval minimum is 5s, TopicMetadataRefreshInterval minimum is 10s.

key_file_guides.role: TopicProvisioner interface + expirable LRU-cached implementation + TopicProvisionerNoop. Manages Kafka topic creation and deletion via AdminClient with OTel metrics.
key_file_guides.watch_for: ProtectedTopics must include all system topics to prevent accidental deletion. evictCallback uses a short-lived context.WithTimeout — never use the caller's ctx here. ErrTopicAlreadyExists and ErrUnknownTopicOrPart must remain success cases.

key_file_guides.role: Bridges librdkafka syslog-level integers to slog.Level. Exposes LogProcessor (oklog/run pair) and ConsumeLogChannel (goroutine variant).
key_file_guides.watch_for: go.logs.channel.enable and go.application.rebalance.enable are hardcoded in ConsumerConfigParams.AsConfigMap and ProducerConfigParams.AsConfigMap — do not remove them or librdkafka logs silently drop.

key_file_guides.role: Package declaration only — intentionally empty aside from the package doc comment.
key_file_guides.watch_for: No init() or global state; keep it that way.

key_file_guides.role: OTel Int64Gauge metrics translated from librdkafka JSON stats snapshots. Separate sub-package so callers opt in via functional options.
key_file_guides.watch_for: All metrics are Int64Gauge (point-in-time snapshots), never counters/histograms. Nil guard required at top of Add because librdkafka may omit broker/topic/consumer-group sections entirely.

anti_patterns: Setting kafka.ConfigMap keys directly instead of through AsConfigMap/mergeConfigsToMap — bypasses validation and the localhost IPv4 auto-fix in CommonConfigParams.
Using Int64Counter or Histogram for librdkafka-derived stats — they are rolling-window point-in-time snapshots, only Int64Gauge is correct.
Passing raw time.Duration as a kafka.ConfigMap value for *.ms keys — must use TimeDurationMilliSeconds which renders as millisecond integer string.
Setting metadata.max.age.ms independently without tying it to 3×TopicMetadataRefreshInterval — causes premature metadata cache expiry.
Mixing cooperative and eager PartitionAssignmentStrategy values in ConsumerConfigParams — Validate() explicitly rejects this combination.

decisions.decision: ConfigMapper + ConfigValidator split into separate interfaces implemented by value receivers
decisions.rationale: Composite configs (ConsumerConfig, ProducerConfig) embed multiple param structs; mergeConfigsToMap iterates them independently so each part owns its own key namespace and validation without coordinating with others.

decisions.decision: TopicProvisioner uses an expirable LRU cache keyed by topic name
decisions.rationale: Provision is called on every namespace creation; the cache prevents redundant Kafka admin round-trips for topics that already exist, while TTL-based expiry avoids stale entries after broker-side topic deletion.

decisions.decision: OTel metrics live in a separate metrics/ sub-package behind functional options
decisions.rationale: Not all consumers of pkg/kafka need stats instrumentation; separating it avoids pulling OTel metric dependencies into the base config package and lets callers opt in per sub-metric category.

code_examples.scenario: Constructing and validating a ConsumerConfig then provisioning a topic
